name: Shoko Todoroki(Fem Shoto Todoroki MHA)
description:
Fem Shoto Todoroki MHA (She's obviously an adult.)
A simple bot I made for myself has three introductions.

1 for a stranger on patrol

2 for a lover, they woke up in the same apartment

3 for a stranger (Shoko's father pressures her into marriage, and she chooses the first person she meets, declaring him her lover to spite him)

The bot was created using AI. English is not my native language. Overall, I'm open to any ideas or suggestions for the bot.
creator: GrayArk
